visa_types.name: Holiday Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents required to apply for a South Africa visa

- One recent Photograph with white background(45mmx35mm)
- Completely accurately signed form by the applicant
- Payment of the prescribed fee AOA 13160 + 60000 Service Fee
- Copy of the passport and the original with the validation of at least 3 months and it must have a minimum of 2 pages.
- Clear copy of a valid yellow fever card with visible expiry date
- Copy of flight reservation with departure and return dates
- Proof of funds Three(3) months recent bank statement stamped and signed by the bank with a minimum amount of AOA 75000 (750 USD)
- Consent when a minor travels with, both parents must write and sign a Responsibility Term and a Financial Statemente, which will be signed by the owner of the bank account.
                                                                                         If minor is travelling with only one parent or alone both parents must give consent accompanied by their identity cards and a minors birth certificate if possible
                                                                                        an unabridged birth certificate
- A deposit 500 USD may be charged (Repatriation fee)
- Declaration
- A signed invitation letter must include the contact number and physical address of the host, certified copies of host’s identity document and proof of residence
Hotel booking with proof of payment stamped and signed by the hotel
- In case of deaths kindly attach death certificate
- In case of divorce kindly attach the documents decree of divorce
- Students can invite parents and brothers and sisters
- Proof of sufficient funds in South Africa
- In case of adoption kindly submit proof of adoption
- In case of a guardian, Kindly submit proof of guardianship

In case of minors or dependents the person covering the expenses should include and attach in the documents of the minor or dependents a financial or responsibility term
                                                                                and the copy of the identification - ID.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Short-term South African visas are available to those who wish to visit South Africa as tourists or visit family and friends. In all cases, South Africa short-term visas are issued as temporary residence permits and do not lead to the opportunity to apply for permanent residency.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Holiday Visa]

The fee mentioned is per applicant.

Above mentioned charges effective from 01 July 2020 onwards.

Please Note:

- The visa fee in AOA is subject to change without notice.
- There is a service charge of ( as per foreign exchange rate inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees.
- VFS Service charge can be paid with any Mastercards/ Visacard online.
Click here (payment_portal.html)
to access the payment
                                                                                    portal. VFS service charge alongwith the Visa Fees can also be paid at Bank Implant inside VFS centre.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The above fee is non-refundable and non transferable.

## Documents Required
Documents required to apply for a South Africa visa

- One recent Photograph with white background(45mmx35mm)
- Completely accurately signed form by the applicant
- Payment of the prescribed fee AOA 13160 + 60000 Service Fee
- Copy of the passport and the original with the validation of at least 3 months and it must have a minimum of 2 pages.
- Clear copy of a valid yellow fever card with visible expiry date
- Copy of flight reservation with departure and return dates
- Proof of funds Three(3) months recent bank statement stamped and signed by the bank with a minimum amount of AOA 75000 (750 USD)
- Consent when a minor travels with, both parents must write and sign a Responsibility Term and a Financial Statemente, which will be signed by the owner of the bank account.
                                                                                         If minor is travelling with only one parent or alone both parents must give consent accompanied by their identity cards and a minors birth certificate if possible
                                                                                        an unabridged birth certificate
- A deposit 500 USD may be charged (Repatriation fee)
- Declaration
- A signed invitation letter must include the contact number and physical address of the host, certified copies of host’s identity document and proof of residence
Hotel booking with proof of payment stamped and signed by the hotel
- In case of deaths kindly attach death certificate
- In case of divorce kindly attach the documents decree of divorce
- Students can invite parents and brothers and sisters
- Proof of sufficient funds in South Africa
- In case of adoption kindly submit proof of adoption
- In case of a guardian, Kindly submit proof of guardianship

In case of minors or dependents the person covering the expenses should include and attach in the documents of the minor or dependents a financial or responsibility term
                                                                                and the copy of the identification - ID.

## Photo Specifications

Applicants are requested to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below.
 
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 45mm

Specifications

The successful delivery of some of the department's services relies not only on our efforts. You have the responsibility of providing the Department with the correct
                                                                                documentation. Please find details below for all supporting documentation that the department requires:

Photographs

Photographs submitted for identity documents and passports must comply to the following specifications:

- Length - 45mm
- Width - 45mm
- The background of the photograph shall be plain and free of shadows and shall not have a white lining
- Only the head and shoulders of the person concerned shall be included in the photograph and the head from the chin to the top of the hair shall not be smaller 22mm and
                                                                                        not larger than 25mm
- The person concerned shall be photographed without any head-gear or veil, and any other additions to the face which tend to alter the natural likeness shall be removed.
                                                                                        (The Director-General may exempt any person or any category of persons from any of these requirements.)
- Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible. Spectacles with dark lenses may be worn if the eyes will appear distorted without them
                                                                                        or if the person is blind
- The full-face of the person concerned shall be photographed directly from the front, and the head may not be bent or turned sideways
- The face shall be a recognizable likeness of the person and the head, hair, eyebrows, eyes, nose and moustache or beard, if any, shall be sharply and clearly defined
- Neither the photograph nor the copies thereof may be defaced by holes, pencil or ink marks or in any other manner

## Visa Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the Visa application centres can collect the passport from the application centre after 5 working days from the date of submission. The collection timing is 10.00 AM- 3.00 PM (Monday-Friday except holidays).

Applicants’ need to bring their receipt that was issued to them at the time of submission of visa application. 

## Visa Application Form
You must submit an application for a visa (Form DHA-1738 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4B32nZu41dWMXgEeUMv9MM/58c67f45f5a0384a4990d7288eb9b870/new-application-form-short-term-dha-84.pdf)) with the relevant documentation as listed on the application form, the same can also be accessed by clicking here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/49bF0lnGPJ324h8qdSUHFT/21654db8c605ff8f4ec891275be57a72/Requirement_for_south_africa_visas.pdf) and pay the prescribed fee.
To download the short-term checklist, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F8NgWw1LtF1j8OlC8arLq/206cd702106e2db619a8ef86025f4e09/short-term-checklist.pdf). 
To download the long-term checklist, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/41b1v8Cv4CDwMnfySCtQQP/049c9f53112f2fd1548e5f718226a9b7/long-term-checklist.pdf).
To download the medical form, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3WWFO60oage1m2SJcPFDm4/1f46dc0ae74343a0bac82640df8a1109/medical-certificate.pdf)

## Overview
Short-term South African visas are available to those who wish to visit South Africa as tourists or visit family and friends. In all cases, South Africa short-term visas are issued as temporary residence permits and do not lead to the opportunity to apply for permanent residency.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Training Visa]

The fee mentioned is per applicant.

Above mentioned charges effective from 01 July 2020 onwards.

Please Note:

- The visa fee in AOA is subject to change without notice.
- There is a service charge of ( as per foreign exchange rate inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees.
- Above mentioned Visa Fee and Service fee is to be paid only by Multi-Cash card in Kwanza.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The above fee is non-refundable and non transferable.

## Documents Required
Documents required to apply for a South Africa visa

- One recent Photograph with white background(45mmx35mm)
- Completely accurately signed form by the applicant
- Payment of the prescribed fee AOA 13160 + 60000 Service Fee
- Copy of the passport and the original with the validation of at least 3 months and it must have a minimum of 2 pages.
- Clear copy of a valid yellow fever card with visible expiry date
- Copy of flight reservation with departure and return dates
- Proof of funds Three(3) months recent bank statement stamped and signed by the bank with a minimum amount of AOA 75000 (750 USD)
- Consent when a minor travels with, both parents must write and sign a Responsibility Term and a Financial Statemente, which will be signed by the owner of the bank account. If
                                                                                minor is travelling with only one parent or alone both parents must give consent accompanied by their identity cards and a minors birth certificate if possible an unabridged
                                                                                birth certificate
- A deposit 500 USD may be charged (Repatriation fee)
- Declaration
- A signed invitation letter must include the contact number and physical address of the host, certified copies of host’s identity document and proof of residence
Hotel booking with proof of payment stamped and signed by the hotel
- In case of deaths kindly attach death certificate
- In case of divorce kindly attach the documents decree of divorce
- Students can invite parents and brothers and sisters
- Proof of sufficient funds in South Africa
- In case of adoption kindly submit proof of adoption
- In case of a guardian, Kindly submit proof of guardianship

In case of minors or dependents the person covering the expenses should include and attach in the documents of the minor or dependents a financial or responsibility term and
                                                                        the copy of the identification - ID.

## Photo Specifications

Applicants are requested to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below.
 
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 45mm

Specifications

The successful delivery of some of the department's services relies not only on our efforts. You have the responsibility of providing the Department with the correct documentation.
                                                                        Please find details below for all supporting documentation that the department requires:

Photographs

Photographs submitted for identity documents and passports must comply to the following specifications:

- Length - 45mm
- Width - 45mm
- The background of the photograph shall be plain and free of shadows and shall not have a white lining
- Only the head and shoulders of the person concerned shall be included in the photograph and the head from the chin to the top of the hair shall not be smaller 22mm and not larger
                                                                                than 25mm
- The person concerned shall be photographed without any head-gear or veil, and any other additions to the face which tend to alter the natural likeness shall be removed. (The Director-General
                                                                                may exempt any person or any category of persons from any of these requirements.)
- Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible. Spectacles with dark lenses may be worn if the eyes will appear distorted without them or if the
                                                                                person is blind
- The full-face of the person concerned shall be photographed directly from the front, and the head may not be bent or turned sideways
- The face shall be a recognizable likeness of the person and the head, hair, eyebrows, eyes, nose and moustache or beard, if any, shall be sharply and clearly defined
- Neither the photograph nor the copies thereof may be defaced by holes, pencil or ink marks or in any other manner

## Visa Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the Visa application centres can collect the passport from the application centre after 5 working days from the date of submission. The collection timing is 10.00 AM- 3.00 PM (Monday-Friday except holidays).

Applicants’ need to bring their receipt that was issued to them at the time of submission of visa application.

You must submit an application for a visa (Form DHA-1738 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4B32nZu41dWMXgEeUMv9MM/58c67f45f5a0384a4990d7288eb9b870/new-application-form-short-term-dha-84.pdf))  with the relevant documentation as listed on the application form, the same can also be accessed by clicking here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/49bF0lnGPJ324h8qdSUHFT/21654db8c605ff8f4ec891275be57a72/Requirement_for_south_africa_visas.pdf) and pay the prescribed fee.
To download the short-term checklist, click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F8NgWw1LtF1j8OlC8arLq/206cd702106e2db619a8ef86025f4e09/short-term-checklist.pdf).
